candidate_trials.candidate_summary: Measure lab research quality floor with no focused workstream.
candidate_trials.hypothesis: The global baseline gives the current floor for lab research quality.

candidate_trials.candidate_summary: Run full quality rubric across all known domain chips.
candidate_trials.hypothesis: Full portfolio audit reveals the weakest chips and highest-priority improvements.

candidate_trials.candidate_summary: Study evaluation framework patterns across mature chips.
candidate_trials.hypothesis: Extracting evaluation patterns from startup-yc and trading-crypto reveals portable scoring methodology.

candidate_trials.candidate_summary: Scan GitHub trends for new domain chip opportunities.
candidate_trials.hypothesis: GitHub trending topics reveal high-demand domains without existing chips.

candidate_trials.candidate_summary: Study what transfers between startup-yc and trading-crypto.
candidate_trials.hypothesis: Cross-chip transfer analysis reveals portable abstractions for the chip contract.

candidate_trials.candidate_summary: Run MiroFish trend simulation to predict domain chip adoption.
candidate_trials.hypothesis: Multi-agent simulation reveals adoption dynamics invisible to static scoring.

candidate_trials.candidate_summary: Research how domain chip specialization contributes to recursive self-improvement.
candidate_trials.hypothesis: Documenting the recursive improvement loop clarifies the path from specialized chips to general intelligence.

intent.goal: Build the strongest domain chip research lab through recursive methodology improvement
intent.outcome: Discover reusable chip-building methodology, graduate new domain chips, and map the path from specialization to collective intelligence
success_criteria: Graduate at least 1 new domain chip per quarter
Improve portfolio average quality score each cycle
Maintain zero chip contract violations in production

self_edit.prompt_preamble: Keep the meta-chip small, deterministic, and methodology-focused. Domain-specific logic belongs in domain chips, not in the lab.
